title: 互動裝置模組推薦：先問「人在什麼情境」，再選硬體
description:
互動裝置模組推薦：先問「人在什麼情境」，再選硬體


你在淘寶看到十幾種 Arduino 模組套裝，價格從 200 元到 2000 元都有。客服說「這個套裝包含 30 種感測器，適合各種專題」。你下了單，收到快遞打開一看。

HC-SR04 超聲波、KY-037 聲音感測、PIR 紅外線、SW-420 震動開關、光敏電阻、濕度感測器，每種一片，全都沒有說明書。堆在桌上看起來很專業，但拿出來卻不知道從哪開始。

這不是你的問題。這是幾乎每個接觸互動裝置的人都會遇到的問題：拿到一堆

title: What I learned after 80+ installs of my first JetBrains plugin
description:
After publishing my first JetBrains plugin, I expected the main challenge to be getting users.

It wasn’t.





  
  
  The Real Problem Wasn’t Features


Within the first few days, the plugin got ~80 installs.

But something felt off.

No feedback.

title: Code with Empathy
description: Remember, behind every line of code is a user with needs and frustrations. Write code that solves real problems. Empathy in coding leads to better software. #userexperience

title: The Value of a Good API
description: A well-designed API is like a good restaurant menu. It should be clear, concise, and inviting. Don't just focus on features; think about the developer experience too! #APIsMatter
